prompts.input: PR #55 introduces a 'StateMachine' class for order processing. Existing code uses simple enum-based states. PR is the first use.
PR #56: extracts a 1-method 'Helper' class with 1 caller. No other planned callers in the comments or roadmap.
PR #57 adds 'graphql' and 'apollo-client' as deps. No other changes. App already has REST + fetch.
PR #58 'Refactor auth module'. Diff shows public API signature change: login(email, password) → login(credentials: {email, password}). External SDK consumers exist (per package.json 'exports').
PR #59: adds a new 'subscriptions' table with 4 indexes. Migration script included. No down-migration. No backup plan.
PR #60: 'Update README'. Diff: +12 lines, all text. No code changes.
